title: Tiffany Le
text:
I am a senior at the University of Oklahoma studying computer science and mathematics. I am also an undergraduate research assistant for the NSF AI Institute for Research on Trustworthy AI in Weather, Climate, and Coastal Oceanography (AI2ES), where I work with Dimitrios Diochnos and Jay Rothenberger on semi-supervised learning methods.
My academic interests lie broadly within the realms of security, privacy, and machine learning. I have experience with machine learning, distributed computing, and software development, and have also dabbled with applied cryptography and other areas in security.
The painting above is by Winslow Homer, titled Weatherbeaten.
